title: taraxacum aequilibratum
intro: Taraxacum aequilibratum, commonly known as the dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion genus. The plant's leaves and roots possess medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The leaves are high in vitamins and minerals, and the roots contain inulin, a prebiotic that supports digestive health, while also exhibiting anti-inflammatory properties. Taraxacum aequilibratum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, and promote overall well-being.
